metadata.top_features:

No show design: Stays hidden under sneakers and casual shoes for a seamless look

Strategic cushioning: Provides targeted support without bulk

Set includes: 3 pairs of socks

Size: One size fits most
Pattern: Solid and striped
Color: Multicolor

media.alt_text: Women's Hidden No Show Socks- 3 Pair - True Energy Socks

variants.title: Women's Hidden No Show Socks- 3 Pair

description.plain: Looking for a sock that stays hidden under sneakers and casual shoes? Check out our 3 Pair Infrared Technology Hidden Socks. Lightweight with strategic cushioning and stay in place heel grips, the TRUEENERGY® Hidden Socks give you the casual barefoot look without actually being sockless. Plus, TRUEENERGY® socks use yarn infused with NASA-inspired infrared technology. Infrared ceramic crystals are ground; permanently infused into the polymer yarn used. When combined with your body's natural heat it forms infrared energy to improve circulation and tissue regeneration, promoting recovery and performance.

products.title: IR No-Show 24/7 Socks

description.plain: Invisible, stretchable socks with far infrared technology for all-day comfort and recovery.

unique_selling_points: Innovative far infrared fiber promotes thermal regulation and microcirculation for enhanced comfort and recovery.
metadata.top_features:
Invisible low-cut design: Stays hidden in trainers, pumps, and ballerina shoes for a discreet look
Far infrared fiber technology: Promotes thermal regulation and improves peripheral microcirculation for faster recovery
Moisture-wicking synthetic fabric: Keeps feet dry and fresh during extended wear
Anti-bacterial properties: Reduces bacterial growth to help manage conditions like eczema and athlete's foot
Elasticated trim: Ensures a slip-free, secure fit for all-day comfort
metadata.tech_specs:
Material: Synthetic with far infrared fiber
Color: Black
Size: Customizable
Pattern: Solid
Target Gender: Unisex
Country of Origin: Italy

media.alt_text: IR No-Show 24/7 Socks

variants.title: IR No-Show 24/7 Socks

description.plain: Your feet are important. Make everyday a little bit more comfortable with the ABSOLUTE360 Infrared No-Show 24/7 Socks. The Infrared No-Show 24/7 Socks (invisible socks or secret socks, as they are also known) are the ultimate in comfort, stretch and fit. These unisex socks are lightweight and comfortable to wear for everyday use, rest, and post-exercise recovery. The Infrared No-Show 24/7 Socks have been designed to get that “invisible” look when wearing certain kinds of shoes; such as trainers, hills, pumps or ballerina style shoes. The low-cut style ensures that they won’t be seen when wearing shoes. The elasticated trim guarantees a slip-free fit. The Infrared No-Show 24/7 Socks are made from an innovative far infrared (FIR) emitting fibre to help maximise thermal regulation. The emission of far infrared penetrates deep into the tissues promoting improved peripheral microcirculation and cell metabolism. This, in turn, can help reduce swelling and relieve minor pain and discomfort from the feet. The socks anti-bacterial properties reduce bacterial growth, which can help with conditions such as eczema and athlete’s foot. Whether you sit for long periods, or stand on your feet all day, the ABSOLUTE360 Infrared No-Show 24/7 Socks will keep feet feeling fresh and dry. This product is Made in Italy – you are guaranteed the highest quality and level of craftsmanship. INFRARED Technology built into the core of ABSOLUTE360 | Perform Better, Recover Faster.

products.title: Men's Performance No Show Socks with Tab - 3 Pair

description.plain: Invisible no show socks with compression, infrared technology, and reinforced support for all-day comfort and durability.

unique_selling_points: Combines targeted compression and infrared energy technology for enhanced circulation, support, and recovery in a discreet, no show design.
metadata.top_features:
Invisible no show tab design: Maintains a clean look in low-top sneakers and casual footwear
True X compression technology: Promotes circulation and reduces fatigue for improved performance
Infrared energy infusion: Supports muscle recovery and enhances comfort during activity
Reinforced heel and toe: Provides extra durability and added comfort for all-day wear
Mesh venting and moisture control: Ensures breathability and keeps feet dry
metadata.tech_specs:
Pack Size: 3 pairs
Fabric Composition: 68% infrared-infused polyester, 19% cotton, 10% nylon, 3% spandex
Color Options: Black, Gray
Pattern: Solid
Target Gender: Male

media.alt_text: Men's Performance No Show Socks with Tab - 3 Pair

variants.title: Men's Performance No Show Socks with Tab - 3 Pair

description.plain: Our No-Show Tab sock provides the casual look you want with the comfort and performance you need. Invisible in low-top shoes, such as sneakers. Combines fashion and technology to deliver maximum comfort and durability for all day wear. Featuring a unique arch band to keep the sock comfortably in place, and a soft tab back to protect your heel from rubbing. Reinforced heel and toe, with select cushion for added comfort and support. Plus, TRUEENERGY® socks harness the power of our proprietary Tru-X Technology that combines the circulation and support benefits of targeted compression with the recovery power of Infrared Energy to give you most complete and innovative, athletic sock on the market. This powerhouse technology is woven into one of the softest and most comfortable socks available and is 7X more durable than the leading athletic sock on the market. These may be the best socks you ever own.

media.alt_text: Men's Hidden No Show Socks with Tab - 3 Pair - True Energy Socks

variants.title: Men's Hidden No Show Socks with Tab - 3 Pair

description.plain: Offering the best of both worlds. Our Hidden No Show Sock with heel Tab allows your sock to be invisible in the shoe while offering added comfort and protection in the heel. Lightweight with strategic cushioning and stay in place tab design provides comfort and support in all the right places. Plus, TRUEENERGY® socks are powered by a unique combination of targeted Compression and Infrared Technology. When combined with your body’s natural heat it forms infrared energy which improves circulation, speeds up healing and drives cellular regeneration - promoting recovery and performance. Compression + Infrared Technology Invisible look with lightweight compression for support and secure fit Includes: Comfort welt top with heel grip so sock stays securely in place Seamless Toe for Comfort, Reinforced Heel and Toe for Durability, Expanded Heel Pocket for an Improved Fit, Arch Band to keep sock stable, and Mesh Venting for improved air movement Strategic Cushioning for all day comfort and support Provides temporary localized pain relief in the foot and ankle Specialty blended fabric transports moisture away from skin keeping your feet comfortable and dry. The InfraRed Technology does not wash out and remains effective for the life of the product. 3 Pair Pack Fabric: 83% Infrared Infused Polyester, 11% Cotton, 4% Nylon, 2% Spandex

variants.title: Men's Hidden No Show Socks with Tab - 3 Pair

description.plain: Offering the best of both worlds. Our Hidden No Show Sock with heel Tab allows your sock to be invisible in the shoe while offering added comfort and protection in the heel. Lightweight with strategic cushioning and stay in place tab design provides comfort and support in all the right places. Plus, TRUEENERGY® socks are powered by a unique combination of targeted Compression and Infrared Technology. When combined with your body’s natural heat it forms infrared energy which improves circulation, speeds up healing and drives cellular regeneration - promoting recovery and performance. Compression + Infrared Technology Invisible look with lightweight compression for support and secure fit Includes: Comfort welt top with heel grip so sock stays securely in place Seamless Toe for Comfort, Reinforced Heel and Toe for Durability, Expanded Heel Pocket for an Improved Fit, Arch Band to keep sock stable, and Mesh Venting for improved air movement Strategic Cushioning for all day comfort and support Provides temporary localized pain relief in the foot and ankle Specialty blended fabric transports moisture away from skin keeping your feet comfortable and dry. The InfraRed Technology does not wash out and remains effective for the life of the product. 3 Pair Pack Fabric: 83% Infrared Infused Polyester, 11% Cotton, 4% Nylon, 2% Spandex

media.alt_text: Women’s Performance No Show Socks with Tab – 3 Pair

variants.title: Women’s Performance No Show Socks with Tab – 3 Pair

description.plain: Our No-Show Tab sock provides the casual look you want with the comfort and performance you need. Invisible in low-top shoes, such as sneakers. Combines fashion and technology to deliver maximum comfort and durability for all day wear. Featuring a unique arch band to keep the sock comfortably in place, and a soft tab back to protect your heel from rubbing. Reinforced heel and toe, with select cushion for added comfort and support. Plus, TRUEENERGY® socks harness the power of our proprietary Tru-X Technology that combines the circulation and support benefits of targeted compression with the recovery power of Infrared Energy to give you most complete and innovative, athletic sock on the market. This powerhouse technology is woven into one of the softest and most comfortable socks available and is 7X more durable than the leading athletic sock on the market. These may be the best socks you ever own.
